name: Yihai International Holding Ltd.
summary: Yihai International Holding Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, develops, manufactures, distributes, and sells hot pot soup flavoring, hot pot dipping sauce, and Chinese style compound condiment products under Haidilao brand. It offers spicy vegetable oil, fragrant tallow, mellow tallow, sour tomato, green pepper and beef tallow, red curry and beef tallow, and three delicacy broth hot pot condiments; mushroom soup hotpot broths; and fresh soups. The company also provides braised, fragrant halogen, minced garlic, spicy, thirteen kind of spices, and fresh spicy crayfish seasoners; Chinese sauerkraut and crayfish seasoners; fish sour soup with pickled pepper; picked fish seasoner; tomato sour soup and fish, spicy and sour fish, and Chinese sauerkraut and fish hot pot condiments; spicy boiled fish, tomato malatang, sour soup malatang, and chilly pot seasoners; and fresh and original marinade sauces. In addition, it offers various HDL hot pot sauces, hot pot oil seasoners, hot pot chilli powders, and spicy barbecue sauces; and sweet pepper, oat and green pepper, onion and soybean, hot and sour yellow pepper, fine beef, and green pepper and bolete table sauces. Further, the company offers snack food; raw materials, such as soya bean oil, golden popcorn, and snail rice noodles; self-serving small hot pot and rice products; and consulting services. It provides its products through distributors to hypermarkets, supermarkets, grocery stores, neighborhood stores, and butcher shops, as well as e-commerce channels covering approximately 31 provincial regions of China, as well as the Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan regions; and 49 international countries and markets. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China.
